meta.purpose: Veo cinematic background prompts for BioDynamX Obsidian Vault

assets.prompt: Abstract close-up of data particles flowing through obsidian glass tubes. Deep black background. Faint surgical green (#00ff41) light traces along the edges. Microscopic medical-grade texture. Cinematic 24fps. No text. Ultra-minimal. Dark. Precise.

Extreme macro shot of neural pathways activating in sequence. Black background. Thin green luminescent lines propagating left to right. Medical imagery feel — like watching a diagnostic scan. Slow, deliberate movement. Cinematic depth of field. 24fps loop.
Sharp geometric pulse expanding from center. Pure black to bright surgical green flash, then fading. Like a system reboot. Hard edges, no gradients. 2-second burst. Cinematic.

Abstract architectural wireframe grid rotating slowly in 3D space. Obsidian black background. Bright surgical green wireframe lines. Engineering blueprint aesthetic. Precise, mathematical, authoritative. 24fps loop.
Gold and green seal materializing from particles. Premium luxury feel against pure black. Like a wax stamp forming. Surgical green glow around edges. Cinematic slow motion. 24fps.
